message:
perf(core): convert last_insert_rowid from RefCell<i64> to Cell<i64>

Cell::get()/set() is ~1ns vs RefCell::borrow()/borrow_mut() ~5ns.
last_insert_rowid is accessed on every INSERT row in the hot path
(current_last_insert_rowid() and set_last_insert_rowid_without_sync()).

Saves ~8ns per INSERT row (2 accesses × 4ns savings each).
For 10K rows: saves ~80µs.

Only 4 usage sites — all simple get/set patterns, perfect for Cell.
Connection has 11 more RefCell<Copy-type> fields that could be converted
(in_transaction, total_changes, etc.) for additional savings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
